templates.title: Hello Kiln
templates.purpose: Smallest promoted-spec path using the standard Elixir/Phoenix feature workflow.
templates.cost_hint: low / moderate — bounded by workflow caps; actual usage varies with model and retries.
assumptions: Operator has provider credentials configured if stages reach live agents.
Typical duration (not a guarantee): under one hour for a trivial spec on a warm cache.

templates.title: Game Boy vertical slice
templates.purpose: Dogfood-depth slice: external Rust Game Boy path with honest compile caps.
templates.time_hint: moderate / high — cold compile and multi-stage pipeline
templates.cost_hint: moderate — see workflow caps; indicative cost (USD) is not a guarantee.
assumptions: External workspace may be required for full scenario parity (see spec body).

templates.title: Markdown spec stub
templates.purpose: Structured markdown spec example for inbox import and edit-first flows.
templates.cost_hint: low / moderate — same workflow caps as Hello Kiln.
assumptions: Spec is operator-authored markdown only — no code execution at template load.
